---
title: "Country Analysis"
---

This page tracks how life expectancy changes over time for one country.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| fig-cap: "Life expectancy over time for a selected country"
#| label: fig-country

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

country_name = "United States"  # change if needed
c = df[df["country"] == country_name].sort_values("year")

print("Selected country:", country_name)
print("Rows:", c.shape[0])

plt.plot(c["year"], c["life_expectancy"], marker="o")
plt.xlabel("Year")
plt.ylabel("Life expectancy")
plt.title(f"Life Expectancy Over Time: {country_name}")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

This plot shows the trend in life expectancy for the selected country.
